level_signals: 7+ years of product management or technical program management experience
Proven track record of defining and executing complex programs across multiple functions
Experience influencing technical decisions particularly as they impact reliability, security, latency and scalability
Ability to influence peers / managers and build consensus

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of product management or technical program management experience with extensive experience partnering closely with software engineering teams
Experience providing program management during all phases of software development.
Proven track record of defining and executing complex programs across multiple functions
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to establish strong relationships with stakeholders and senior leaders
Thrive in solving ambiguous problems and see opportunities where others see chaos
Experience influencing technical decisions particularly as they impact reliability, security, latency and scalability
Relentless focus on users and solving for their needs and wants

Have strong prioritization frameworks to drive development for the product team and customers. You will have a strong understanding of our product roadmaps and help leaders navigate how to balance meeting the roadmap and balancing priority customer needs

scope.surface: Payments Experiences — Payment Links, Elements, Checkout, Terminal (online and in-person)
scope.business_model: B2B financial infrastructure platform; merchant-facing products
core_responsibilities: Drive functional and technical delivery of key team-, org-, and company-wide initiatives
Collaborate with engineering teams to design, scope, and shepherd features
Create functional specs, project plans, and roadmaps
Own and execute multiple software engineering programs simultaneously
Help drive product decisions to align with higher company initiatives
Help influence peers / managers and build consensus while dealing with ambiguity
Drive clarity across all stakeholders on the goal, problem and outcomes the team is working towards

Understand the technical problems that need to be solved, and work closely with necessary stakeholders of the engineering teams, technical systems/processes involved to define and manage the most effective way to enable teams to deliver solutions
Bring rapid clarity to ambiguous situations, resolve them effectively, communicate decisions efficiently, and enable teams to move towards implementing solutions

green_flags: Clear product surface with named products (Payment Links, Elements, Checkout, Terminal)
Explicitly states preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement — invites broader applicant pool
Early-stage team signals significant influence on product roadmap and technical direction
Strong cross-functional scope across engineering, product, and GTM
red_flags: No location or remote/hybrid policy specified — candidates cannot assess work arrangement
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
7+ year minimum is firm; limited flexibility signaled

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 7+ years requirement and scope of responsibilities)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and product surface)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities and product context; not stated in JD)
location.type (set to 'unclear'; no location or work arrangement details in JD)
ambiguities: Location/work arrangement not specified anywhere in the JD — could be remote, hybrid, or onsite at any Stripe office
